*** Falcon Component → Page usage matrix ***
*** For each component, which files use it and how often ***
*** Generated by Tier 1 of the Frontend Knowledge Path ***

# 📍 Component → Page Usage Matrix

> For each of the 62 Falcon components (and their wrapper variants), this matrix shows **which files use it** and **how many times**. Generated from a grep sweep across all HTML + TS files in `falcon-web-platform-ui`. Updated whenever this script reruns.

## How to read

- **Refs** = total occurrences of `<falcon-…>` or `<falcon-angular-…>` tag (HTML opening tags only)
- **Files** = distinct files containing at least one occurrence
- **Sample files** = first 3 files (by alphabetical path) that use the component
- **Wrapper-tw** = the Tailwind/Light DOM variant (e.g. `<falcon-input-tw>`) — counted separately to show migration progress
- **Hot-spot** = file with the most occurrences (single biggest consumer)

## Methodology

```
find apps/ libs/ -type f \( -name "*.html" -o -name "*.ts" \) \
  | xargs grep -oE '<falcon(-[a-z0-9-]+)+' \
  | sort | uniq -c
```

187 unique tags found across 413 files (785 total references).
